mission.title: sops: Adding support for ssh keys for encryption.
mission.description: Adding support for ssh keys for encryption.. Requested by 36+ users.

steps.title: Check current sops setup
steps.description:
Verify your sops version and configuration:
```bash
sops --version
```
This feature requires sops v3.7.0+ with age encryption support.

steps.title: Review sops configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant sops configuration:
SSH keys could be also used for encryption. They are already in well-known locations i.e. `/etc/ssh/ssh_host_rsa_key`. Most developer/servers have already ssh keys.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Adding support for ssh keys for encryption.
steps.description:
The fix adds age encryption support to sops as an alternative to PGP/KMS.

Setup and usage:
```bash
# Generate an age key
mkdir -p ~/.sops/age/
age-keygen -o ~/.sops/age/keys.txt

# Encrypt a file using the age public key
sops --age age1hhpw5e07syc00jwtwxs64e6nqv9exhmmjrlztcxkw9vgnjqev47qllp3ry -e secret.yaml > secret.enc.yaml

# Decrypt the file
export SOPS_AGE_KEY_FILE=~/.sops/age/keys.txt
sops -d secret.enc.yaml
```

See the fix PR for details: https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/688

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that age encryption works correctly:
```bash
# Create a test file
echo 'secret_key: my_secret_value' > /tmp/test-secret.yaml

# Encrypt with age
sops --age <your-age-public-key> -e /tmp/test-secret.yaml > /tmp/test-secret.enc.yaml

# Decrypt and verify
sops -d /tmp/test-secret.enc.yaml
```
Confirm the encrypted file can be round-tripped successfully.

resolution.summary:
Implements support for [age](https://age-encryption.org/) as I requested in #603. I'm not a Go programmer and was learning the sops code as I went, so there's likely a lot I missed here. But the basic encrypt and decrypt operations are working for me! I used #569 as a reference for how to do this, as suggested by .

Example (this has been simplified in more recent commits.
codeSnippets:
# Generate an age key
mkdir -p ~/.sops/age/
age-keygen -o ~/.sops/age/keys.txt

# Encrypt a file
sops --age <age-public-key> -e secret.yaml > secret.enc.yaml

# Decrypt
export SOPS_AGE_KEY_FILE=~/.sops/age/keys.txt
sops -d secret.enc.yaml

prerequisites.description: A working sops installation or development environment.
